Multiple Canva Demo
===================

This demo illustrates how to compose multiple synchronized canvae in one window.
It creates three clock canvae for different time zones and updates each one
continuously, demonstrating multi-panel layouts and independent item updates.

Movie
-----

.. raw:: html

   <video controls autoplay loop muted playsinline style="max-width: 100%; height: auto;">
     <source src="movies/multiple_canva.mp4" type="video/mp4">
     Your browser does not support the video tag.
   </video>
